summary: Tested Film Improvement System (Migliora Film) - P0 bug fix verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: ImprovementPanel renders correctly for proposed films with cast_upgrade and plot_twist suggestions. VelionOverlay swipe-to-dismiss and dismiss button working.

issues: Modal appears on login and blocks UI - needs to be dismissed before testing
